detail.description:
Guide your snake through tricky puzzles, eat apples to grow longer, and reach the teleportation portal. Each move matters plan carefully to make your snake long enough to succeed!

Key Features:

Strategic Gameplay: Eat apples, grow longer, and reach the portal.

Challenging Levels: Puzzles get harder as your snake grows.

Fun & Addictive: Easy to learn, hard to master!

Relaxing & Engaging: A perfect mix of calm play and brain-teasing fun.

Ready to slither, eat, and grow your way to victory? T

inferredReasons.label: 🔍 待深入調查
